importantText: Trading CFDs and Forex involves significant risk and may result in the loss of your invested capital. You should not invest more than you can afford to lose and should ensure that you fully understand the risks involved.
generalRiskText: Contracts for Difference (CFDs) and Foreign Exchange (Forex) trading involve a high degree of risk. The financial products offered by Dolphin Markets Ltd. are leveraged products that carry a substantial risk of loss to your capital.
generalRiskText2: These instruments are suitable only for experienced investors who understand and are willing to accept the risks involved. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
leverageRiskText: Leverage (or margin trading) amplifies both gains and losses. A small movement in the underlying market can have a disproportionately large effect on your traded position. This can work against you as well as for you.
leverageRiskList1: You may sustain a total loss of your initial margin and any additional funds deposited
leverageRiskList2: If the market moves against your position, you may be required to deposit additional funds on short notice
leverageRiskList3: Leverage ratios vary by instrument and account type (up to 1:2000 for major forex pairs)
marketRiskText: Financial markets can be extremely volatile. Prices may fluctuate rapidly, especially during times of high volatility such as major economic announcements, central bank decisions, or geopolitical events.
marketRiskText2: Market conditions such as low liquidity or high volatility may result in:
marketList2: Slippage (execution at a different price than requested)
counterpartyRiskText: As a CFD provider, Dolphin Markets acts as the counterparty to all trades. This means that you have a contractual obligation to us, not to the underlying market or asset. In the unlikely event of our insolvency, your positions may be affected.
operationalRiskText: Trading involves risks related to systems and technology, including:
legalRiskText: Trading CFDs may not be legal in certain jurisdictions. It is your responsibility to ensure that:
legalList1: You are legally permitted to trade CFDs in your jurisdiction
legalList2: You comply with all applicable laws and regulations
legalList3: You understand the tax implications of your trading activities
negativeBalanceText: Dolphin Markets provides negative balance protection, meaning that you cannot lose more than the funds you have deposited with us. However, in extreme market conditions, there may be delays in implementing this protection.
riskList1: Never trade with money you cannot afford to lose
riskList4: Keep up to date with market news and events
riskList5: Use a demo account to practice before trading live
riskList6: Do not trade when emotionally distressed
riskList7: Seek independent financial advice if unsure
disclaimer: Disclaimer: This risk warning does not disclose all the risks involved in trading CFDs. You should fully understand the nature of these products and the extent of your exposure to risk before deciding to trade. If you do not understand the risks involved, you should seek independent financial advice.
footer: Dolphin Markets Ltd. is regulated by the Financial Services Commission of Mauritius
